Home.title: My Medications
Home.addFirst: Click the button above to add your first medication
Home.errorDuplicate: A medication with identical details already exists.
Home.reminderCopyPlaceholder: e.g. Time to take your meds and take care of yourself
Home.reminderCopyHint: Leave empty to use default random copy (max 80 chars).

Pending.title: To take
Pending.hint: Medications appear here once the current time reaches or passes your preset time. Check off after you have taken the dose. Entries not checked within 6 hours are removed to make room for the next reminder.
Pending.empty: Nothing pending yet. Items appear here after the preset time.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.dangerDesc: Clearing all data will delete all your medications and settings. This action cannot be undone.
Settings.disclaimerBody: This app is for personal reminders and record-keeping only. It is not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always follow your healthcare provider’s instructions; seek professional care if you feel unwell. The developers disclaim liability for any direct or indirect consequences of using this app.
Settings.notificationsHint: Reminders fully rely on system notifications (same channel as the test notification). The app does not provide independent keep-alive push delivery. If reminders fail after swiping the app away, enable notifications and exact alarms, and set battery usage to unrestricted.
Settings.testNotificationBody: If you see this, reminders can be delivered.
Settings.testNotificationDenied: Notification permission was not granted. Allow notifications for this app in system settings.
Settings.testNotificationFailed: Could not send the test. Please try again.
Settings.testNotificationUnsupported: Notifications are not supported in this environment.
